text: Meet Argo. One command turns a Playwright script into a launch-ready product video, complete with A.I. voiceover and camera direction.

overlay.title: One command. Full demo.
overlay.body: AI voiceover and camera direction included.

text: The pipeline is three steps. Write the demo, record the browser, export the video. Camera effects like zoom-to guide the viewer through each step automatically.
Four pillars make it work. Overlays for on-screen text. Voiceover with your choice of engine. Camera effects for editorial direction. And a pipeline that exports everything at once.

Pick your voice. Six engines from local to cloud. Or clone your own voice with M.L.X. audio — record a fifteen second clip, and every demo sounds like you. Locally, privately, no data leaves your machine.

overlay.text: Six TTS engines — swap with one config line

text: Four camera effects. Spotlight. Focus ring. Dim-around. And zoom-to. Each one is a single line in your demo script.
Your demo scripts are just Playwright tests with a few extra helpers. Spotlight, focus ring, dim-around, zoom-to, confetti — all one-liners in your script.

overlay.text: All effects are one-liners in your Playwright script

text: Scene transitions add smooth fades between scenes. Fade through black, dissolve, or directional wipes. One line of config.
Export multiple formats from one pipeline run. Square for Instagram. Vertical for TikTok. Animated GIF for docs and pull requests. And clip extraction for release notes.
Batch pipeline and dashboard. Build all demos at once with dash-dash all. And the dashboard gives you a bird's-eye view of every demo with status, resolution, and quick preview links.

overlay.title: argo pipeline --all
overlay.body: Build everything. Preview from a dashboard.

text: Overlays auto-detect your page theme. The pipeline generates subtitles, chapters, and a timing report. And scene transitions make everything flow.
Oh, and this demo? It was recorded by Argo, using Argo.

overlay.text: This demo was recorded by Argo, using Argo.
